No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a master's level program (tertiary education, Target 4.3) focused on developing research, innovation, and critical thinking skills (Target 4.4, 4.7) through peer learning and discussion.
evidence: 同儕學習，達到交流互動目標

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The objective '學習研究創新的能力' (learning research and innovation ability) tangentially supports Target 8.2 on achieving higher economic productivity through innovation.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly enhances scientific research skills and encourages innovation through '學習研究創新的能力' and '批判相關的論文', aligning strongly with Target 9.5.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to marine life.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to terrestrial ecosystems.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The instruction '維護智慧財產權' (Respect Copyright) provides a minimal, explicit link to upholding the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's emphasis on '同儕學習' (peer learning) and '討論互動' (discussion and interaction) reflects a micro-level form of knowledge sharing and cooperation, aligning with Target 17.6.
